probes.name: cloudflare_deploy
probes.evidence: Wrangler deployed Worker and Assets; custom routes for blackimg.online/* and www.blackimg.online/* deployed; current Worker version 58645d9a-49fc-4da0-b803-af7d75601243.

probes.name: workers_dev_preview
probes.evidence: https://blackimg-online.yangdengkui01.workers.dev/ returns 200 with the homepage; /api/runtime, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /api/checkout, and /missing were checked.

probes.name: cloudflare_zone_routes_dns
probes.evidence: Cloudflare zone is active with apex/www proxied A records, full SSL, Always Use HTTPS, automatic HTTPS rewrites, Universal SSL active, an active certificate pack for blackimg.online and *.blackimg.online, and Worker routes for apex and www.

probes.name: registrar_nameservers
probes.evidence: SpaceShip API reports custom nameservers archer.ns.cloudflare.com and sydney.ns.cloudflare.com for blackimg.online.

probes.name: public_dnssec
probes.evidence: Public DNS-over-HTTPS DS query has no stale DS Answer; NS query returns archer.ns.cloudflare.com and sydney.ns.cloudflare.com.

probes.name: public_ns_propagation
probes.evidence: Public DNS-over-HTTPS NS query returns Cloudflare nameservers.

probes.name: production_apex_https
probes.evidence: Direct HTTPS probe with proxy variables disabled returns HTTP/2 200 for https://blackimg.online/.

probes.name: production_www_https
probes.evidence: Direct HTTPS probe with proxy variables disabled returns HTTP/2 200 for https://www.blackimg.online/.

probes.name: production_runtime
probes.evidence: https://blackimg.online/api/runtime returns ok:true with canonicalOrigin https://blackimg.online, default plan starter, default billing annual, paymentConfigured:false, turnstileConfigured:false, and aiConfigured:false.

probes.name: production_checkout_page
probes.evidence: https://blackimg.online/checkout/ returns HTTP/2 200 and serves the same homepage pricing/checkout surface.

probes.name: production_seo_artifacts
probes.evidence: https://blackimg.online/robots.txt, https://blackimg.online/sitemap.xml, and https://blackimg.online/f9715da5fdfad6bf714ceeb6f4d3b1af.txt return expected content; /missing returns 404.

probes.name: indexnow_submission
probes.evidence: IndexNow POST accepted with HTTP 202 for https://blackimg.online/ and https://blackimg.online/llms.txt.

probes.name: gsc_bing_submission
probes.evidence: Required Google Search Console and Bing Webmaster credentials were not available in the local secure credential store or the current environment.

probes.name: paypal_checkout
probes.evidence: PayPal credentials are missing; checkout endpoint returns configuration error instead of fake payment.

probes.name: ai_generation
probes.evidence: AI_IMAGE_ENDPOINT and AI_IMAGE_API_KEY are not configured.

probes.name: d1_analytics
probes.evidence: ANALYTICS_DB is optional and not configured.

completionLedger.evidence: Worker/routes, DNS, registrar nameservers, apex HTTPS, www HTTPS, /checkout/, runtime, robots, sitemap, IndexNow, and 404 checks pass. Provider secrets, GSC/Bing credentials, paid checkout, paid AI generation, Turnstile-protected server actions, optional D1 analytics, and browser live flow are not production complete.
